originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_I2C false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 true))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
reasoning: When I2C=F, i2c_master_send is not declared (L9-11: '#ifdef CONFIG_I2C' block skipped). L16 inside da7210_init() (compiled when SOC_DA7210=T) references i2c_master_send → undeclared identifier compile error. This configuration is non-compilable. Classification: FALSE.
